## Description

Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy. Create original visual designs, never copying existing artists' work to avoid copyright violations.

## When to Use

Use this skill when:

- Creating posters
- Designing visual art
- Building infographics
- Creating visual designs
- Designing printed materials
- Creating branded graphics
- Building visual presentations

**Triggers**: "Create a poster", "Design this visual", "Make an infographic", "Create visual art", "Design a graphic"

## When NOT to Use

- For copying existing artists' work (copyright violation)
- For web UI (use frontend-design instead)
- For algorithmic art (use algorithmic-art instead)
- For presentations (use marp-slide instead)

## Workflow

### Phase 1: Concept

- Understand purpose
- Define audience
- Sketch ideas
- Plan layout

### Phase 2: Design

- Choose color scheme
- Select typography
- Create layout
- Add visual elements

### Phase 3: Refinement

- Adjust proportions
- Refine colors
- Improve typography
- Add details

### Phase 4: Export

- Export as PNG/PDF
- Verify quality
- Test on different devices
- Archive design files

## Tools & References

**Related Skills**:

- brand-guidelines - Apply brand colors
- theme-factory - Create themes
- frontend-design - Design UI
- algorithmic-art - Generate art

**Design Principles**:

- Balance and proportion
- Color theory
- Typography
- Visual hierarchy
- Whitespace

## Best Practices

- **Original Work**: Create original designs, don't copy
- **Color Theory**: Use complementary colors
- **Typography**: Choose readable fonts
- **Hierarchy**: Guide viewer's eye
- **Simplicity**: Less is more
- **Testing**: Verify on different devices

## Skills Required

| Skill | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `brand-guidelines` | Apply brand colors and typography |
| `theme-factory` | Create and apply design themes |
| `frontend-design` | Design UI layout and interaction |

## Verification Checklist

- [ ] Purpose and audience defined
- [ ] Color scheme selected and applied
- [ ] Typography chosen for readability
- [ ] Layout balanced with clear hierarchy
- [ ] Exported as PNG/PDF at correct resolution
- [ ] Design files archived

## Pitfalls

- Copying existing artists' work violates copyright
- Poor color choices reduce readability and accessibility
- Overcomplicated layouts confuse the viewer
- Exporting at wrong resolution reduces output quality
